session.expired: Your session has ended. Please sign in again.
session.renewFailed: Could not refresh your session — retrying.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: This demo has no identity provider. Signing in seeds a fake OIDC session in localStorage via the kit's dev bypass.
login.action: Sign in with the dev bypass
login.productionNotice: The bypass refuses to seed in a production build, so this button does nothing in `nuxt build` output.

session.title: Session
session.description: Seeded by the kit's dev auth bypass

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: Emails are encrypted at rest and looked up through a blind index.

search.label: Find by email
search.hint: Exact match via the blind index — partial emails will not match.

welcome.replayed: Already queued for this contact — the idempotent replay was returned.

delete.title: Delete this contact?
delete.message: {name} will be removed permanently. The demo server requires the admin role for this.

contacts.empty: No contacts yet — create one to get started.

notes.title: Notes
notes.selectPrompt: Select a note from the list, or create a new one.

files.title: Files
files.description: Blobs stored in Postgres by the framework's object-storage provider.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Backed by the framework's scoped config engine — values are validated, encrypted, and cached; unset keys read back their schema default.

hints.welcomeSubject: Overrides the subject of the next welcome email queued from the contacts page.

role.title: Demo role
role.description: Sent as the x-demo-role header on every API call. Writing settings and deleting contacts require admin; pick viewer to see the server's 403 path surfaced through the kit's error messenger.

errors.bothRequired: Pick both a start and an end date.
errors.endAfterStart: The end date must not be before the start date.

errors.internal_server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: Your demo role is not allowed to do that. Switch to admin on the settings page.
errors.invalid_idempotent_replay: This request was already made with different data.
errors.rate_limit_exceeded: Too many requests — slow down for a moment.
errors.network_error: The demo API is unreachable. Is apps/demo-server running on port 3001?

messages.expected_string_to_match_email: must be a valid email address
